question: How many different doctors did I visit?
ground_truth_answer: I visited three different doctors: a primary care physician, an ENT specialist, and a dermatologist.

retrieval_results.context:
The user was diagnosed with chronic sinusitis by ENT specialist Dr. Patel.
The user was prescribed a nasal spray by Dr. Patel.
The user should discuss their sinusitis diagnosis and treatment plan with Dr. Smith.
The user will schedule a follow-up appointment with their primary care physician to discuss fatigue and joint pain and rule out other conditions.
